linkedin.text: Saint-Tropez whispers luxury — it never shouts. ⛵ Private beach clubs, yacht-deck receptions, hillside villas with sea views that make a room go silent. It's the kind of place people say yes to before you finish the sentence. Considering the Côte d'Azur for 2026? image_prompt: Aerial drone view over the Saint-Tropez peninsula at midday, turquoise bays dotted with white yachts, pine-covered headlands meeting golden beaches, a sweep of Côte d'Azur coastline under brilliant blue sky, no people visible, luxurious and expansive.
